title: hieracium subramosum subsp. polytmetum
intro: Hieracium subramosum subsp. polytmetum, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hawkweed include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, treat wounds, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infection. Hawkweed is typically prepared as a tincture, salve, or tea, and is often used to treat minor cuts and scrapes, as well as to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing.
